MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for request for judgment.

Dept. 505; Judge Garrett Wong; Clerk: N Webb; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 10:00 am and concluding at 10:39 am.

Plaintiff The City and County of San Francisco is represented by Kathy Shin, Esq. also appearing on behalf of The City and County of San Francisco is Brian Crossman, Esq and Chris Lynch, Esq.
Defendant not appearing.

Plaintiff presents summary of facts, claims and an offer of proof.

Plaintiff addresses Points A-O of Plaintiffs request as set forth on the record.

The matter is submitted.

By the statements made by Plaintiff and its counsel, documents filed, and evidence presented, the Court finds that Plaintiff has provided sufficient evidence proving each element of the complaint.

Good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff The City and County of San Francisco.

Proposed Judgment signed and filed.(D505)
